scripts.text:
USE P21Play;
SET NOCOUNT ON;
DECLARE @PoNo int=6070127, @PoLineNo int=8, @PoLineUid int=387337, @LocationId int=210, @ItemId varchar(40)='11880 528SY';

SELECT
    section='oe_line_po_detail',
    order_number=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), order_number),
    line_number=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), line_number),
    po_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), po_no),
    po_line_number=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), po_line_number),
    quantity_on_po=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), quantity_on_po),
    completed,
    cancel_flag,
    delete_flag,
    connection_type,
    date_created=CONVERT(nvarchar(30), date_created, 126),
    date_last_modified=CONVERT(nvarchar(30), date_last_modified, 126),
    last_maintained_by
FROM dbo.oe_line_po
WHERE po_no=@PoNo AND po_line_number=@PoLineNo;

SELECT TOP (20)
    section='function_call_type_P',
    order_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), order_no),
    item_id,
    qty_ordered=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), qty_ordered),
    qty_allocated=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), qty_allocated),
    linked_qty=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), linked_qty),
    original_linked_qty=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), original_linked_qty),
    c_qty_on_other_po=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), c_qty_on_other_po),
    line_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(20), line_no),
    oe_line_uid=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), oe_line_uid),
    po_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), po_no),
    po_line_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(20), po_line_no),
    po_line_uid=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), po_line_uid)
FROM dbo.p21_fnt_get_linkable_transactions(@LocationId,@ItemId,@PoNo,@PoLineNo,NULL,NULL,'N',@PoLineUid,'N','N','P',CONVERT(date, GETDATE()))
ORDER BY order_no, line_no;

SELECT TOP (20)
    section='function_call_type_G',
    order_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), order_no),
    item_id,
    qty_ordered=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), qty_ordered),
    qty_allocated=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), qty_allocated),
    linked_qty=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), linked_qty),
    original_linked_qty=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), original_linked_qty),
    c_qty_on_other_po=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), c_qty_on_other_po),
    line_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(20), line_no),
    oe_line_uid=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), oe_line_uid),
    po_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), po_no),
    po_line_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(20), po_line_no),
    po_line_uid=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), po_line_uid)
FROM dbo.p21_fnt_get_linkable_transactions(@LocationId,@ItemId,@PoNo,@PoLineNo,NULL,NULL,'N',@PoLineUid,'N','N','G',CONVERT(date, GETDATE()))
ORDER BY order_no, line_no;

SELECT TOP (100)
    section='transfer_hdr_recent',
    th.transfer_no,
    th.from_location_id,
    th.to_location_id,
    th.complete_flag,
    th.delete_flag,
    th.date_created=CONVERT(nvarchar(30), th.date_created, 126),
    th.created_by,
    th.last_maintained_by
FROM dbo.transfer_hdr AS th
WHERE th.date_created >= '2026-05-19'
ORDER BY th.transfer_no DESC;

SELECT TOP (100)
    section='transfer_line_for_item',
    th.transfer_no,
    tl.transfer_line_no,
    tl.inv_mast_uid,
    im.item_id,
    tl.qty_to_transfer,
    tl.qty_transferred,
    tl.qty_received,
    th.from_location_id,
    th.to_location_id,
    th.date_created=CONVERT(nvarchar(30), th.date_created, 126)
FROM dbo.transfer_hdr AS th
JOIN dbo.transfer_line AS tl ON tl.transfer_no=th.transfer_no
JOIN dbo.inv_mast AS im ON im.inv_mast_uid=tl.inv_mast_uid
WHERE th.date_created >= '2026-05-19'
  AND im.item_id=@ItemId
ORDER BY th.transfer_no DESC;
